title: Webinar Drive Efficiency & Productivity with monday.com & customer testimonial by Channable

posts.author: ElineThomas (Eline)
posts.cookedHtml:
Fast growing companies face the risk of outgrowing their internal processes.

Join and discover from monday.com and Tryve experts how to increase efficiency and productivity in a fast and sustainable way. We will introduce the platform, share success stories from other Dutch and Belgian companies, and demonstrate how you can transform your workflows:

  • Work OS for enhanced, company-wide collaboration
  • Project management
  • Marketing & communication
  • CRM
  • Other workflows decided by webinar participants

To wrap up, our customer Channable will show how monday.com supported their growth and took their work to the next level.

Practical details

Webinar: Drive Efficiency & Productivity with monday.com
Date: 23th of January 2023
Time: 11:00 AM (CET)
Language: English
www.tryve.be

Reserve your spot here
